name: Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over low heat.
2. Add the flour and whisk until a white roux forms.
3. Remove from heat to cool slightly.
4. Scald the milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Gradually beat the scalded milk into the roux.
7. Return to heat and stir until it comes to a boil, then reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
8. Add the bay leaf, onion, and clove to the sauce.
9. Simmer for 15-30 minutes, stirring often.
10. Gradually add hot cream, reserving some for garnishing.
11. Season with salt, nutmeg, and white pepper to taste.
12. Strain through a chinois into a warmed serving dish.
13. Top with melted butter to prevent skin from forming.
14. Keep warm in a bain-marie until ready to serve.
Serves: 50
